title: Smoky Canadian Fish Fritters
description: A delicious German-inspired take on traditional fritters, featuring smoky Canadian fish.
instructions: In a medium bowl, whisk together flour, eggs, mustard, salt, and pepper.
Add the flaked Canadian smoky salmon, panko breadcrumbs, lemon zest, and chopped fresh dill to the bowl.
Mix well until all the ingredients are combined.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the mixture into balls.
Shape each ball into a patty.
Heat about 1/2 inch of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
When the oil is hot, add the patties to the skillet.
Cook the patties for about 3-4 minutes on each side, or until they are golden brown and crispy.
Serve the Smoky Canadian Fish Fritters hot with your favorite dipping sauce.
